feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The shape of home
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,388Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 63

Summary: After a brutal apartment fire leaves Buck temporarily displaced, Bobby insists he stay somewhere that isn’t a hotel and definitely isn’t the loft with its half-melted kitchen and smoke-damaged walls. Eddie has a spare room. Christopher has opinions. Buck tells himself it’s temporary, that he can survive a few weeks sleeping down the hall from the Diaz boys without wanting more than he’s ever let himself have. Unfortunately, living with Eddie means movie nights, school runs, quiet mornings, shared grief, old wounds, new habits, and the slow, terrifying realization that Buck might already know what home feels like. And worse? Eddie might too.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: My Hands on Your Body
entry.summary:
Author: TibiDecet

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,906Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 36

Summary: After Eddie figures out he's in love with Buck, he makes the executive decision to be calm, collected, and a perfectly normal friend. It goes about as well as you'd expect, when neither of them have a clear idea of how best friends are supposed to act with one another. With a road trip looming on the horizon, things are expected to come to an end - one way or another.

entry.title: The Shape of Things Falling Apart
entry.summary:
Author: 79_50

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,575Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 95

Summary: After Chris moves in with Buck, Eddie Diaz does what he’s always done best: he takes control. He plans. He prepares. He makes sure there are no loose ends. Buck watches the man he loves grow quieter, calmer, and terrifyingly resolved, and realises too late that Eddie isn’t coping. He’s preparing. This is a story about love, guilt, and what happens when someone decides the best way to protect the people they love is to disappear.

entry.title: Learning To Stay
entry.summary:
Author: FandomWork101

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,958Chapters: 37/?Kudos: 455

Summary: Buck knows the 118 is his family. They have been with him through so much. But when everyone goes home, it is Buck left by himself. Buck decides he wants to change that. He decides that he wants to create his own family. One that doesn’t leave. One that stays. So Buck adopts a dog. But that leads to some jealousy from the Diaz family as they feel this dog is taking all of Buck’s time.

entry.title: spell bound
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,595Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 299

Summary: Maybe: Tabitha 🔮Your spell: “Love Spell: Buck” has been completed! The whole car jolts. He looks at Eddie. Eddie is also staring at the screen, almost as if Eddie can also see Buck’s hallucination. And he is hallucinating, because the alternative is that Eddie, who does not believe in magic, ordered what appears to be an Etsy witch and placed a love spell on what appears to be Buck. Or, Buck hallucinates a text message from Eddie's Etsy witch.

entry.title: Unexpected visitors
entry.summary:
Author: Ficalicious

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,570Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 194

Summary: “Well one of her old friends still lives in Hershey and you know, they talked and Maddie mentioned the pregnancy-““Still perfectly normal.”“And her friend ran into your parents at the store and told them about the pregnancy.”Buck froze.“And I mean you know, you know Maddie hasn’t spoken to them since she found out about… you know.”“The Jakeman thing.”“Yeah, yeah the Jakeman thing. She blocked their number. And even before that she didn’t ever talk to them about you really I mean- she never even told them about Rina or your leg or anything she- she’s totally been respecting your right to not want them in your life-““Chim. What exactly happened this morning?”“They must have used a new number to try and call Maddie because they got through.”“… Okay. Okay so my parents called. That’s… not great but-““They called to tell us that they’re in LA.”“They-“ Buck blinked once. Twice.He swallowed hard.“They’re in LA?” ...In which the Buckley parents come to town. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: The Most Wonderful Thing in Nature
entry.summary:
Author: MysticCloud97

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,544Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: "Buck, you're going to pay for my therapy session after this," Chimney said as he loosened Buck's pants. The blond just gripped Eddie's hands as he sobbed loudly in pain. He then gave a sharp gasp as the cool air hit him, completely unaware of the shocked reaction his team as giving him. "That's not possible," Hen gasped out as she stared at his lower body in shock. Chimney turned pale, and Eddie already knew that he was going to need more than therapy. "What is it?" Buck asked, voice edging with pain as he tried to curl his knees around his stomach. Eddie looked down, and his mouth turned dry. There was a vagina where Buck's penis was supposed to be. ##KnockBuckUp2026 prompt 7: Buck has a pussy

entry.title: To Catch a Thief
entry.summary:
Author: edssluttywaist

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,595Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 127

Summary: Buck starts laughing loudly. Eddie holds his breath, Buck is pulling his waistband, literally looking at his ass. He blushes a darker shade of red; he doesn't think he can get redder than this. When Buck finally talks, he is still laughing, his finger still pulling Eddie's waistband. “Eddie, these are my fucking boxers.”“It’s your favorite, the one with the easy access.” Eddie answers, turning back to look at Buck.or: 5 times Eddie stole Buck's clothes +1 time Buck catches him.

entry.title: The Shape of Home
entry.summary:
Author: miladystark

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,707Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: The door swung open before I knocked. Usually that meant Buck had been watching for us through the peephole like a giant golden retriever with no dignity. This time it wasn’t Buck. It was some kid. He's definitely not my age because he is younger, all skinny elbows and wary eyes. Brown hair falling into his face, oversized hoodie sleeves covering half his hands. He stared at me like I was the one trespassing. “Oh,” I said. “Oh,” he said back.

entry.title: The familly we choose
entry.summary:
Author: Badalhoko

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,467Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 6

Summary: Buck grabs Eddie’s arm by surprise, walking them away. “Hey–” he tries to interject but Buck signals him to stay quiet and he looks serious, which is rare for Buck. Once he’s far Buck shot “I–I–I think that’s my son…!” Eddie’s surprised, like, really surprised. “SON!” he whispers shouts, eyes wide open “SHHH” he silences Eddie “you remember I was a sperm donor some years ago? The kid said his parent’s names were Connor and Kameron…” “Oh… OOHH”~~~or: Buck's bio son appear in a call and need a foster. Buck and Eddie are happy to fill in

entry.title: Piece By Piece (English Version)
entry.summary:
Author: Pookiebrin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,629Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 808

Summary: Buck had finally understood... it had taken him 3 months, 3 months of silences and angry looks, of orders given coldly and endless lists of tasks at the station, of people leaving when he sat down at the table, of conversations stopping when he arrived.3 months but he had finally understood: Station 118 did not forgive and those he had fought for had turned their backs on him.3 months but it had become clear to him: he was not welcome there and that was not his family, it never had been. And now all that was left was to let go. But a call and a girl who reminds him too much of himself could be the solution to the cold in his life and his heart.

entry.title: Borrowed space
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiemax

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,060Chapters: 2/10Kudos: 4

Summary: After a pipe bursts and floods his apartment, Buck shows up at Eddie’s late at night, needing a place to stay. While he’s welcomed into the warmth of Eddie and Christopher’s home, Buck can’t ignore the strange tension in his chest—something about being there feels both right and unsettling at the same time.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Touched by Death
entry.summary:
Author: 911fan_gir1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 962Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

Summary: The first time I encountered Evan was not his older brother, despite popular belief. When Evan first put it in the world, the doctors wooshed him away to be poked and prodded. An infant next to him was wailing. His skin melted into the color of his hospital teddy bear, and I knew it was his time. But this story is not of the little child of teddy bears but of Evan. When I took his next door neighbor his wide blue eyes met mine with surprise. Notes from Death:It is rare a human ever look me in the eyeAnd not join me, in my embrace His eyes were so intent, he caught me by utmost surprise. I tried to pull away gently but in the commotion his little arms grazed the skin above his right eye. I inhaled sharply. Never in the centuries of my job has a soul touched a living one. Evan began wailing as a large red dot appeared where his roommate had touched him. I was scared? Perhaps, that was the feeling I felt that day. But mostly I knew that Evan was going to be special, he had to be. For who could be touched by death, and live to tell the tale?Or A look at Evan “Buck” Buckley’s life through losses– as told by death

  • Major Character Death
